title.en: The Lord of the Ruins' pupils shrank.

content.en:
"How did this guy get in?"

The Lord of the Ruins and the others were very confused, and they didn't think of the reason for a while.

Soon, a bone transformation realm creature guessed: "This primeval-level genius is a seam in the territorial sea realm, will he have broken through the fifth level of the primeval gold tablet in the territorial sea boundary sea?"

"It's really possible, but it's so hard to get through the fifth level!"

The Lord of the Ruins' pupils shrank.

After all, he knew very well the difficulty of the fifth level, and he only broke through the fourth level at the beginning, and he never passed the fifth level.

Later, when he became a bone transformation realm, he had no chance to break through the assessment of the Taigu Golden Monument again.

"Wait for him to come out and kill him!"

"Yes, to come out of the Ancient Gold Realm, he must pass through this entrance, and with his strength of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, can he still escape?"

"Is this primeval-level genius a fool who thinks that if he can break into the primeval gold realm, he can leave alive?"

"This guy has a lot of potential, but unfortunately he has to die!"

Ye Tian kept listening, smiling secretly in his heart.

These guys thought they were looking for death, but unfortunately it was just a copy of his body, and there was no problem in killing him, as long as they could get the benefits of the primeval gold realm.

At this time, the Blood Abyss Heavenly Ancestor of the Chaos Ruins Cave spoke: "Lord of the Mixed Ruins, the primordial-level genius just now, I seem to have seen it, and the primordial-level genius who broke into the Sea of Chaos before was him, and he was killed by me. However, at that time, he only had eight blood transformation realms. "

The Lord of the Ruins frowned: "Are you sure it's this primordial-level genius?"

"The breath is about the same!"

Blood Abyss Heavenly Ancestor said, but his tone was not very sure.

"Maybe it's not the same Heavenly Ancestor, it's just the same race!" said the Lord of the Ruins.

Seeing this, the Blood Abyss Heavenly Ancestor didn't say anything anymore.

Anyway, he just reported it, and whether they believe it or not, the Lord of the Ruins, is another matter.

Moreover, in the eyes of many bone transformation realm creatures, this primordial-level genius in the territorial sea boundary is certain to die, and there is no need to dwell on his identity.

......

Swire Silverworld.

Ye Tian entered here and was immediately discovered by other Blood Transformation Realm creatures.

However, the Swire Gold Realm did not allow fighting, so they just stared at Ye Tian and did not make any other moves.

The primeval gold realm is not very large, but the whole world seems to be composed of golden light, and there are even projections of primeval gold tablets in the surrounding void, but they cannot be touched.

"These should be projections of the real ancient golden monuments, but there is no way to touch them, you can only look at them!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Whew!!

One by one, these Blood Transformation Realm creatures sat cross-legged and began to cultivate.

The Ancient Netherworld is best suited to create the Ancient Bone Technique and comprehend the Ancient Golden Script, so naturally they don't want to waste time, after all, they can't stay in the Ancient Netherworld permanently, and once the entrance is closed, they will all be removed.

Ye Tian didn't waste any time, and immediately began to cultivate.

He tried to create the top primeval bone technique, and as soon as he tried to create it, countless flashes of inspiration, comprehension and spiritual light continued to emerge, as if this was a good place to create the primeval bone technique.

"This effect is so good, it won't be long before I can create a top-notch primeval bone technique!!!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Sure enough, it didn't take too long, Ye Tian successfully created a top-notch primeval bone technique, and then integrated it into an immeasurable bone, so that this immeasurable bone successfully transformed into a bone.

The primeval netherworld, coupled with the ability to keep trying to copy the body, made Ye Tian's efficiency in creating top-notch primeval bone techniques many times faster, and it was also extremely easy.

Gradually, Ye Tian created more and more primeval bone techniques, and more and more immeasurable bones on his body completed bone transformation, and his strength became stronger rapidly.

On this day, Ye Tian's three hundredth immeasurable bones completed the transformation.

At this time, he was very close to the transformation of the immeasurable bones of his whole body.

Three hundred and ten immeasurable bones and bones!

Three hundred and twenty immeasurable bones and bones!

Three hundred and thirty immeasurable bones and bones!

Three hundred and forty immeasurable bones and bones!

......

After a long time, Ye Tian had already completed the transformation of three hundred and sixty immeasurable bones, and only the last five immeasurable bones remained.

At this time, he found that he continued to create the top primeval bone technique and integrate it into the Infinite Bone, but there was no way to make the Infinite Bone complete the bone transformation.

"It's a bottleneck!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He thought that maybe he could ask the Lord of Darkness, maybe the Lord of Darkness had good advice.

Dark Sea.

Ye Tian came to visit the Lord of Darkness.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, do you have something to do?"

The Lord of Darkness asked.

Ye Tian immediately said his question, "Lord of Darkness, I have already completed the bone transformation of three hundred and sixty immeasurable bones, how can I make the last five immeasurable bones complete the bone transformation?"

"What, you've completed the bone transformation of three hundred and sixty immeasurable bones!!!!"

The Lord of Darkness was stunned.

If an ancient-level genius wants to complete the bone transformation of the immeasurable bone, he must create a top-notch primeval bone technique, Ye Tian has now completed the bone transformation of three hundred and sixty immeasurable bones, proving that Ye Tian has created three hundred and sixty top-notch ancient bone techniques!

That's too fast, isn't it?

He knew very well that it hadn't been long since Ye Tian became the Heavenly Ancestor of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, how could he create so many top-notch Ancient Bone Techniques, this was simply too demonic!

Soon, he came to his senses.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, if the last five immeasurable bones want to complete the bone transformation, it is very difficult to do it by relying only on the Ancient Bone Technique, especially the Ancient Genius, it is even more difficult to do it, which is also one of the biggest reasons why it is difficult for the Ancient Genius to become the existence of the Bone Transformation Realm. "The Lord of Darkness.

"Is there any way to do it?"

Ye Tian asked.

He didn't believe that an ancient-level genius couldn't become a bone transformation realm, because there was an ancient-level genius-level bone transformation realm in the Hunhe Boundary Gap, and there was also this kind of bone transformation realm in the territorial sea boundary fracture, but it was difficult to continue to improve after becoming a bone transformation realm, and his cultivation was not high.

"Of course there is a way!" said the Lord of Darkness: "The first way is to create a supreme ancient bone technique that surpasses the top primeval bone technique, and it requires a lot of primeval gold inscriptions, in short, I have only heard of this method, and I haven't met anyone who has created it." The second way is to find special treasures and make the immeasurable bones and bones change. There are many treasures that can make the immeasurable bone and bone change, but basically it is only suitable for the bone transformation realm, and if it is used in the nine blood transformation realms, the immeasurable bone will not be able to bear it, and it will be shattered directly. Therefore, this kind of special treasure suitable for the Blood Transformation Realm is very rare and has a high value, but it is basically broken through the second method. "

As soon as the Lord of Darkness said this, Ye Tian completely understood.
